statement.headerDoc:
Problem 008 — Fujimoto Dimension Algebra (FDA) ↔ Mathlib Embedding
  + V3 Skeleton — FIDT (Fujimoto Infinite Dot Theory) structure

  This file formalizes:

    V1. FDA (STEP 844) — inductive DimensionValue with 5 kinds
         (Finite ℤ, ±∞, AbsoluteZero, Indeterminate)
         + dimAdd, dimNeg, dimMul operations (closure shown structurally)

    V2. Problem 008 resolution — bijection with a Mathlib-native type:
          DimensionValue ≃ Option (Option ℤ) ⊕ Unit ⊕ Unit
        Round-trip theorems (zero sorry).

    V3. FIDT (STEP 845) skeleton — InfiniteDot = (DimensionValue × DFumt8)

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
